seo.homeDescription: Uncover hidden supply chain risks before they become headlines. Real-time monitoring, cascade analysis, and institutional signal detection.
seo.exploreDescription: Search and map supplier relationships across global industries. Visualize supply chain networks and identify concentration risks.
seo.cascadeDescription: Model how disruptions propagate through interconnected supply chains. Simulate scenarios and estimate recovery timelines.
seo.signalsDescription: Track smart money movements and early warning indicators from SEC filings, insider trades, and earnings calls.
seo.newsGapDescription: Discover material supply chain events that haven't received adequate media coverage. Find alpha in underreported stories.
seo.aboutTitle: About ChainFlow — Supply Chain Intelligence by SPINAI
seo.aboutDescription: Learn about ChainFlow's mission to democratize supply chain intelligence and make global trade networks transparent.

about.title: About ChainFlow
about.missionText: We believe supply chain transparency shouldn't be a luxury. ChainFlow democratizes access to supply chain intelligence, empowering investors, analysts, and businesses to make informed decisions.
about.storyText: Born from the realization that global supply chains are the hidden backbone of the economy, ChainFlow was built to make these invisible networks visible. We combine alternative data, AI analysis, and intuitive visualization to reveal the connections that matter.
about.teamText: We're a team of engineers, data scientists, and supply chain experts passionate about bringing transparency to global trade.
about.valuesTransparencyText: We believe information asymmetry creates unfair markets. Our goal is to level the playing field.
about.valuesAccuracyText: Every data point is verified and cross-referenced. We'd rather show less than show wrong.
about.valuesAccessibilityText: Powerful tools should be available to everyone, not just institutions with deep pockets.
about.contactText: Have questions or want to partner with us? We'd love to hear from you.
